text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are! Let's get started<n>on Operation:
Get Japan Hyped<n>already!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Operation: Get Japan Hyped is<n>Daitaku Helios's
plan to use her<n>smile to "turn up the vibes" across
all<n>of Japan.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She appointed me as her producer,<n>and I'm
supposed to be helping her<n>with it today, but...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna get the whole country<n>hyped with a
top-tier clip dripping with<n>positive vibes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Um, she means she wants to take a<n>video of
herself smiling and make it<n>go viral. That way,
everyone will see<n>her, right?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Okay, no time to waste! Let's do this,<n>you two! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! Welcome to Helios's ☆ Hype<n>Channel!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Today's challenge will be to see how<n>many points
I can score in<n>karaoke—while smiling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And there's no better song for thisthan Umapyoi Legend ! Hit it!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Umadacchi! ♪ Sukidacchi! ♪ Ahahaha!<n>What does
"dacchi" even mea—ack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: H-Helios! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! I'm laughing way toohard! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Today's challenge is to see if I can<n>get through a
heart-wrenching movie<n>with a smile on my face!
Let's get<n>watchin'!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hngh... That poor old man's all alone<n>now...
There's nobody to—wait, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Omigooosh! The froggy came back!<n>Awww, the
friendship between the<n>old man and the frog is
sooo<n>touching!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I think we got a good clip of her!<n>Okay! Cut!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just gotta edit the video in the app<n>aaand... posted!
Now it's just a<n>matter of waiting to see how
many<n>views it gets.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What?! The views are already in the<n>hundreds?!
And the comments are<n>pouring in! Everyone's
writing<n>"lmao"!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can't believe it actually<n>worked! Let's
keep it up, team!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios's video goes super<n>viral and gets
over a million views in<n>a day. But that's not the
end of it. A<n>few days later...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: → Oh my gosh! This cannot be real!Wh-what should I do, Palmer?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Producer! I'm so glad to see you! I-I<n>don't know
what to do!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I got a DM from N.B. asking if I'd be<n>up for
performing in her Japan<n>concert!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She's a super famous international<n>singer, and
this is her first visit to<n>Japan! All you gotta know is
that<n>she's the GOAT!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Look, look! She said she was shook<n>by my smile
and that she wanted to<n>invite me on her show
after seeing<n>my vid!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The message she shows me is<n>entirely in another
language. There<n>are some pretty long words in
there...
choice_data_list: You actually understood all this? That's amazing!
You actually understood all this? That's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I have no idea what it actually<n>says! I was just
goin' off the vibes!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Eh, I'm sure it'll be fine! ☆ Anyway, I<n>need to
reply ASAP... What should I<n>say? Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: OK!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, she replied already! Hmm... I<n>think she's
saying we've make this<n>concert a total hit! Um, I'll
just type...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: b(^w^)d

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh! She said, "Great!" Looks like she<n>understands
me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh! Helios's vibes are so fire,<n>they're
smashing through entire<n>language barriers!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wait, does this mean that my plan'sgone from "Operation: Get JapanHyped" to "Get the World Hyped"?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As their plan expands to a global<n>scale, I can't
help being amazed by<n>the sheer presence these
two have.
